title: MetaGenesis Core: Governance-Enforced Verification Infrastructure for Computational Scientific Claims
description: Open-source verification protocol that makes computational claims tamper-evident, reproducible, and independently auditable offline. 20 verified claims across 8 domains (materials science, ML/AI, system identification, data pipelines, digital twin, pharma/biotech, financial risk, fundamental physics). 2132 adversarial tests. 5 verification layers. 8 innovations.
